$comment: Project index for the desk Monitor 1 panel. Bodies live as content/projects/<id>.md and load on demand. Placeholder content for Checkpoint B — owner replaces with real projects in Phase 5.

projects.title: No-Arbitrage Vol Surface
projects.thesis: An SVI parameterization that fits the full equity implied-volatility surface from sparse option quotes, with calendar and butterfly arbitrage ruled out at solve time.

projects.title: Limit-Order-Book Execution Sim
projects.thesis: A queue-position-aware backtester that replays L2 order-book data to estimate fill probability and slippage before a strategy ever touches a live venue.

projects.title: Point-in-Time Feature Store
projects.thesis: A feature store that guarantees point-in-time correctness for model training — no lookahead leakage from sloppy time-series joins.

projects.title: Limit Order Book Simulator
projects.thesis: Microsecond-resolution simulation of Level 2 order-book dynamics tracking individual queue positions, cancellations, and venue latency.

projects.title: Ultra-Low-Latency Inference
projects.thesis: Sub-microsecond deep learning forward passes in C++ using memory-mapped tensor storage, vectorization, and zero-allocation execution paths.

projects.title: Real-Time Feature Pipeline
projects.thesis: Stateful event-driven calculation of moving statistics and market imbalances over 500k events/sec with sub-millisecond execution jitter.
